title: The Empire Strikes Back Weekly
content:
{{Top|rwm|ref|reb|italics=1}}
{{MagazineSeries

|title=''The Empire Strikes Back Weekly''
|publisher=[[Marvel Comics|Marvel UK]]
|start date=[[May 29]], [[1980]]<ref name="TESB 118">[[The Empire Strikes Back Weekly 118|''The Empire Strikes Back Weekly'' 118]]</ref>

'''''The Empire Strikes Back Weekly''''' was the second iteration of [https://en.m.wikipedia.org/wiki/Marvel_UK Marvel UK’s] [[Star Wars]] comic, following on from – and continuing the numbering of – ''[[Star Wars Weekly]]''. 

The weekly title initially reprinted [[Marvel Comics]]' official adaptation of ''[[Star Wars: Episode V The Empire Strikes Back|The Empire Strikes Back]]'', albeit with the American-published episodes spread across a greater number of issues, and in black and white. The rest of each issue was filled with other space-adventure strips previously published by Marvel in America.

After just 22 issues, from issue #140, the publication shifted to a monthly schedule, inevitably dropping “Weekly” from its ''[[The Empire Strikes Back Monthly|title]]''.

==Story breakdown==
A list of the issues of the series, and the US Marvel Comics stories they reprint:
*118-120: [[Star Wars (1977) 39|''Star Wars'' 39]]
*121-123: [[Star Wars (1977) 40|''Star Wars'' 40]]
*124-126: [[Star Wars (1977) 41|''Star Wars'' 41]]
*127-129: [[Star Wars (1977) 42|''Star Wars'' 42]]
*130-132: [[Star Wars (1977) 43|''Star Wars'' 43]]
*133-135: [[Star Wars (1977) 44|''Star Wars'' 44]]
*136-139: [[Star Wars (1977) 48|''Star Wars'' 48]]
